The Space

Thoughtfully Designed for Real Work

  • Fully furnished, move-in ready workspace
  • Private, quiet professional setting
  • Conference table + seating for client meetings
  • Standing desk workspace
  • 75" TV for presentations or trainings
  • Whiteboard for planning + collaboration
  • Futon for additional seating or breaks
  • Coffee bar + kitchenette setup
  • Waiting room or second office space
Ideal For

Who Books the Suite

  • Realtors & real estate agents
  • Mortgage lenders & loan officers
  • Insurance agents
  • Attorneys & financial advisors
  • Small business owners
  • Remote workers & freelancers
  • Coaches & consultants
  • Massage therapists & wellness professionals
  • Photographers (client meetings & reveals)
  • Startups & entrepreneurs
  • Small teams needing meeting space
Amenities

Everything Ready. Just Walk In.

High-Speed Wi-Fi
Reliable connection for presentations and video calls.
Drip Coffee + Keurig
Complimentary self-serve drip coffee and K-Cup — always ready.
Complimentary Water
Bottled water for you and your guests.
Mini Fridge + Microwave
Keep drinks cold, warm up lunch between sessions.
Shared Restroom
Shared with a small number of suite owners — not public.
Convenient Parking
Free or paid on-street parking steps away.
Introductory Pricing

Simple, Flexible Booking

Book by the half day, full day, or two days. No lease. No long-term commitment. The suite is exclusively yours for your entire booking.

Perfect for client meetings or a focused half-day session.

Ideal for trainings, workshops, or full team sessions.
